# Remote - Sr. Data Analyst - Clinical
Company: Alignment Health
Source: Built In
Employment type: Full-time
Checked: April 30, 2026
Freshness source: Built In detail page showed Reposted 6 Days Ago
URL: https://builtin.com/job/remote-sr-data-analyst-clinical/8766559

## Highlights
- Senior clinical data analyst role in healthcare focused on operational reports, dashboards, performance metrics, and clinical outcomes.
- Supports performance management initiatives across teams.
- Health plan/clinical analytics context appears aligned with SQL, reporting, healthcare data quality, and stakeholder support.
strengths: Healthcare clinical analytics, dashboards, performance metrics, and reporting are a strong target-role fit.
Fresh Built In discovery signal shows a very recent repost.
Clinical outcomes and performance-management language aligns with healthcare reporting and data validation.
gaps: Official company posting was not found in the current search result set.
Built In detail should be checked manually before applying because the final apply path may require account or external redirect.
notes: Apply if time after official-link roles. Tailor toward healthcare reporting, clinical outcomes metrics, SQL validation, dashboards, and stakeholder-ready operational analytics.
